rules.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; Pixel 7) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.6099.230 Mobile Safari/537.36

rules.name: 通用公开网页源
rules.description: 高级兜底源：适合粘贴公开漫画详情页或章节页，支持静态网页、懒加载、图片集合和章节下一页追踪。
rules.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; Pixel 7) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.6099.230 Mobile Safari/537.36
